attributes.action: Make albanian an option in schools for gcse
attributes.additional_details: Introducing Albanian as a GCSE supports inclusivity, reflects the UK’s diverse population, and helps Albanian-speaking students value their heritage. It also promotes cultural understanding, language skills, and stronger community engagement within schools.And the mass community
attributes.background: The government could fund curriculum development, train and recruit Albanian language teachers, and work with exam boards to create a GCSE qualification. It could also support pilot programs in schools with Albanian communities and provide resources to promote uptake and awareness.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Introduce Albanian GCSE and A-levels
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/747085
